headline: AUC of `contains FAILED` regex on 499 SWE-bench-Verified-derived paired prompts
value_of_residual_monitor: The residual projection monitor's §5.1 AUC of 0.989 is lower than this baseline's AUC. The mechanistic value of the projection is NOT discriminative power but identifying the residual-stream location and direction at which the pass/fail evidence enters the edit/noop decision.
